agencies.action_required: Post each school district's maximum compressed rate for current and preceding tax year on agency website; notify chief appraisers and school district assessors of posting.
agencies.approval_gate: None; TEA calculates MCRs under Educ. Code §48.2551

agencies.agency: Chief Appraiser of each Appraisal District
agencies.action_required: Make calculations required by Tax Code §11.26(a-10) using posted MCRs; determine portion of appraised value on which school taxes are not imposed due to tax limitation.
agencies.approval_gate: TEA must post MCRs and provide notification per Educ. Code §48.2556(b)–(c)

agencies.action_required: Calculate tax imposed on residence homesteads applying §11.26 limitation; for 2025 tax year calculate both with and without S.B. 4/S.B. 23 changes.
agencies.approval_gate: Chief appraiser calculations and TEA MCR posting must be completed first

agencies.action_required: May not increase total annual ad valorem tax above limitation amount on residence homesteads of individuals 65 or older or disabled.

_note: Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c) directs the legislature to provide formulas protecting school districts against revenue loss but does not assign a specific agency action; it is the constitutional authority underlying the statutory framework. Tax Code §26.09(c-1) contains two conflicting versions from S.B. 4 and S.B. 23, both eff. June 16, 2025; both require dual calculation for 2025 tax year.
